blocks.text: Bodø/Glimt conquer San Siro — Norway dares to dream big in Europe
Glimt's 2-1 win at the San Siro was Norway's finest European night in years. TV2 are already asking: can they go all the way? After this, the question is no longer ridiculous.
🎮 Fri 16:00 — rain (Håvard Nygaard) opens ESL Pro League Season 23, CS2 online
